headline: Rachel was losing money on every kilo she sold to Woolworths.
subhead: So she changed everything. Now you can too.
hero_copy: After the 2020 bushfires devastated her Kempsey property, Rachel Ward asked a question: there must be a better way.

sections.heading: Rachel's story
sections.body: She read Charles Massey. Watched Allan Savory. Converted her entire farm to regenerative agriculture. Then made a documentary about it. FarmThru exists because of farmers like Rachel. We connect them directly to your kitchen. No middlemen. No cold storage. Days old, not weeks.

sections.heading: From the farm
sections.body: "Know Your Farmer is a common quip from us folk trying to reach you, but the farmer had to come to you." — Rachel Ward

sections.heading: Rachel put her farm on the line. We're asking for your email.
sections.body: Join the waitlist now. It takes 10 seconds and you'll be first to know when FarmThru opens investment to the public.

sections.heading: Get first access to invest.
sections.body: Place a refundable $5 deposit to secure VIP status. VIP investors get priority access, exclusive founder updates, and early notice before the campaign opens to the public. Fully refundable at any time. This is not financial advice. A disclosure document will be available on Birchal.

creative_brief: Full-bleed Rachel + cow hero image with dark overlay text. Farm video autoplay muted. Trust stats bar.
